{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Jade experts
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Jade experts]] from two clans were present at the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
